title: Claude Code Just Added What Everyone Wanted (Remote Control)

extracted.hook: Normally, when we want to use Claude code, we have to do so in a chat window like this on our local machine.
transitions: Now, one thing to keep in mind is the session URL.
As you can see, if they're disconnected, it won't let you chat.
extracted.cta: If you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give it a like. Definitely helps me out a ton.
analogies: "So, if I go ahead and scan this QR code right here, it opens up my remote control session of my Herk 2.0 project."

time_references: 29 million daily installs within Visual Studio Code

extracted.vulnerability: "I tried logging in from like a different Claude account with a different email and it was taking a long time to connect and I am not convinced it would actually let me in. But I would still just say don't share that URL."

accelerates: discussing the benefits of remote control
slows: explaining the setup process and requirements
